text:
is the oldest daughter of Willy Tybur.

Appearance

Fine is a young girl with blonde hair that is kept behind her head a low bun and blue eyes, she wears a lavender dress with long and puffy sleeves, an embroidered collar with white socks and black shoes

Personality

Fine appears to be a responsible, caring sister as she was calming down her two siblings before falling down from the couch and reading a story book to her younger sister at night. She is also a loving daughter as when she wished her father good luck with his trip to Liberio, promising him to take her of her siblings.

Story

Marley arc

When the Tybur family arrives in Liberio following the Marley Mid-East War, Fine joins her family to take up residence within the headquarters. She is first seen calming down her two siblings before falling down from the couch. At night, she reads a story book to her younger sister.

As Willy Tybur leaves to attend the play, he entrusts Fine to take care of her siblings.

Trivia

Fine and Louise share the same Japanese voice actress.
